element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls horizontal scrolling shooter with basic movement and weapons
Player learns to choose between four weapon configurations before stage entry
Increases ship velocity; available in all weapon configurations
Support drones; player can acquire up to four total, with movement behavior at maximum capacity
Varies by weapon configuration selected; differs from laser and double variants
Dual-fire capability; requires activation selection; performance depends on configuration
Alternative fire mode; requires activation selection in some configurations
Front-facing durability boost; player chooses between shield or forcefield before level
Full-craft protection with limited hit capacity (3-5 hits depending on version); selectable at stage entry
Pattern recognition and evasion; culminates in dedicated boss rush level
Level composed entirely of consecutive boss confrontations; tests mastery of all combat mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Weapon configuration selection before stage entry
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Horizontally scrolling action with escalating difficulty toward boss encounters; relief provided by pre-stage weapon customization; tension sustained throughout combat sequences with intensity peaking in dedicated boss rush stage

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces four weapon configuration choices and power-up mechanics; player learns evasion and fire patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Boss encounters increase in frequency and complexity; requires pattern recognition and weapon selection strategy
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminates in boss rush stage with consecutive boss confrontations; described as potentially overwhelming without cheat codes
notable_spikes: Boss rush stage - entire level composed of sequential boss battles
Gofer boss fight - series antagonist represents final challenge

notable_level_patterns.description: First instance in Gradius series of a stage designed entirely around consecutive boss encounters with no standard enemy waves between them; tests accumulated mastery of combat system
Before each stage, player selects from four distinct weapon configurations, each with different missile, double, and laser distributions; allows difficulty tuning and playstyle preference per stage
